source_url: inferred from apps/pelagos/src/client.rs (no public JSON-RPC reference found at docs.pelagos.network as of fetched_at)

completeness.notes: STUB ONLY — needs review. Pelagos has no published JSON-RPC reference; surface was inferred from apps/pelagos/src/client.rs (methods: getBalance, getTransactionStatus, getTransactionReceipt, sendTransaction, plus generic /rpc and GET /health). All result schemas (BalanceResult, TransactionStatus, TransactionReceipt, SendTransactionResult, HealthResponse) are permissive (`additionalProperties: true`) because real response shapes are unknown. Each known JSON-RPC method is modelled as its own operation under a synthetic path (`/rpc#<method>`) so codegen emits one Rust method per RPC; on the wire all hit POST /rpc. No auth scheme described — appchain is self-hosted with network-layer access control assumed.
